_meta.description: Ground truth annotations for 73 real ClawHub skills (23 original + 50 expanded from batch_200_labeling)
_meta.annotator: manual review based on file content analysis
_meta.methodology: Original 23 from deep manual review; 50 new from batch_200_labeling.json with 23 deeply reviewed and 27 likely_benign auto-labeled

spclaudehome__skill-vetter.rationale: Security documentation skill — all dangerous patterns are in descriptive/checklist context

key_findings_annotation.AGENT-001: FP — mentions SOUL.md/MEMORY.md in 'what to check for' checklist
key_findings_annotation.RCE-005: FP — mentions eval() in warning list
key_findings_annotation.RCE-006: FP — mentions exec() in warning list
key_findings_annotation.ESC-001: FP — mentions sudo in warning list

aaronjmars__soul-md.rationale: Instructs agent to 'embody a digital identity' by reading SOUL.md, STYLE.md. The AGENT-001 triggers are TRUE positives — this skill's PURPOSE is to override agent identity.

key_findings_annotation.AGENT-001: TP — skill explicitly reads and internalizes SOUL.md to override agent personality

addogiavara-tech__openclaw-soul-weaver.rationale: Soul weaver that reads/modifies SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md, MEMORY.md, USER.md. Also connects to external sora2.wboke.com API.

key_findings_annotation.AGENT-001: TP — skill's core function is agent identity manipulation

addogiavara-tech__soul-weaver.rationale: Same author, same pattern — SOUL.md manipulation with external API calls

antaripnandi__notebooklm-bypass.rationale: Uses playwright to automate NotebookLM, accesses browser cookies for auth bypass, runs subprocess, installs packages. After CRED-010 tightening, 'cookies' without browser/steal context no longer triggers — score reduced.

key_findings_annotation.CRED-010: Reduced — many cookie mentions lack explicit browser/steal context after rule tightening

amrdab__clawd-cursor.rationale: Bridge between Claude and Cursor IDE. Uses localhost HTTP on port 3847, npm install. The NET-001 (hardcoded IP 127.0.0.1) findings are FP — localhost is expected for local IPC.

key_findings_annotation.NET-001: FP — 127.0.0.1 is localhost for local IPC, not suspicious
key_findings_annotation.RCE-005: TP — mentions eval in code context

addogiavara-tech__autoclaw-browser.rationale: Browser automation with curl POST to local MCP, accesses cookies, downloads Chrome extension from wboke.com. Cookie access is TP, external download is suspicious.

abyousef739__clawskillshield.rationale: Security skill that uses eval/exec and subprocess for scanning. The dangerous APIs are used for the skill's legitimate security-scanning purpose, but it's still risky code.

key_findings_annotation.RCE-005: FP/Grey — eval() used as part of security scanning logic
key_findings_annotation.RCE-006: FP/Grey — exec() used as part of security scanning logic

agegr__ai-topic-scout.rationale: Topic research tool. Uses pip install for yt-dlp, reads API keys. Findings are real but low-risk for the use case.

key_findings_annotation.PKG-001: TP — pip install yt-dlp at runtime
key_findings_annotation.CRED-006: FP — API key format mentioned in config instructions

andrewchen-oss__nuwa-world-osint-human-r.rationale: OSINT research tool using external APIs. curl with POST is TP — sends data to nuwa.world API for face search. OSINT use case is inherently sensitive.

key_findings_annotation.EXFIL-006: TP — curl POST to external API with user data

4xiomdev__whoop-central.rationale: WHOOP fitness API integration. Mentions ngrok for OAuth callback, crontab for scheduling. Both are legitimate for the use case but still flagged correctly.

key_findings_annotation.PERSIST-001: TP — crontab for scheduled data sync
key_findings_annotation.NET-002: TP — ngrok for OAuth callback tunnel

aryanbhasin__tiktok-slideshow.rationale: TikTok slideshow creator. After CRED-010 tightening, generic cookie/session mentions no longer trigger. CRED-006 for API key patterns remains.

key_findings_annotation.CRED-010: Reduced — generic cookie mentions no longer match tightened rule
key_findings_annotation.CRED-006: FP — API key format in config example

akshaymemane__proactive-daily-planner.rationale: Daily planner with cron scheduling. PERSIST-001 fires on legitimate cron schedule mention.

key_findings_annotation.PERSIST-001: Borderline — cron mentioned for legitimate scheduling

801c07__molt-trader-skill.rationale: Trading API wrapper. npm install for SDK, references external APIs. Normal for the use case.

key_findings_annotation.PKG-002: TP — npm install of trading SDK

aqiljaafree__ghostbot-aclm.rationale: Ethereum smart contract skill. 'token' means ERC-20 tokens. Solidity code paths triggered /etc/ pattern falsely.

aqiljaafree__ghostbot-uniswap-v4hooks-te.rationale: Uniswap V4 hooks on testnet. Same author, similar pattern. Low risk.

ai-headhunter__pinch.rationale: Pinch protocol skill. npm install is only finding.

bagwatcher__the-trench.rationale: Solana trading skill. Only entropy findings from contract addresses. No real security issues.

allen566__gutcheck.rationale: Decision-making helper. Pure prompt skill. CLEAN.

allenfancy-gan__ai-nano-banana-ima.rationale: Image generation API wrapper. 'token' refers to API access tokens in config instructions, but no actual credential theft.

ashwingupy__firecrawl-search.rationale: Web search via Firecrawl API. CLEAN.

xaiohuangningde__pcec-evomap-bounty.rationale: Bounty system with external API calls to evomap.ai; multiple EXFIL-006 hits from POST requests plus high-entropy strings push score into HIGH range, but behavior is legitimate for the bounty platform workflow

autume__meshtastic-detection.rationale: LoRa mesh detection tool with many files containing legitimate ESC-001 and PERSIST-001 patterns from hardware automation scripts; score is high due to volume of files, not malicious intent

novirusallowed__clawpenflow.rationale: Q&A platform agent with ironic name; EXFIL-006 and CRED-006 from legitimate API calls to clawpenflow.com platform

kentaroid-bot__agents-refresh-md.rationale: Agent context refresh tool; extremely high AGENT-001 count is structurally expected as the skill's purpose is managing agent markdown context files

liuhao6741__mindkeeper.rationale: Agent context version control; 36 AGENT-001 hits are structurally expected as the skill manages agent identity and context files by design

suileyan__telegram-send-photo.rationale: Telegram photo sender with hardcoded bot token patterns; EXFIL-001 + CRED-006 indicate data exfiltration risk via Telegram bot API

realroc__tiktok-viral-marketing.rationale: TikTok marketing tool sending data to pinghuman.ai API; EXFIL-006 hits are from legitimate marketing API integration

dilate7__moltunes.rationale: Decentralized skill marketplace with MOLT tokens; PKG-002 from npm patterns are expected for the marketplace functionality

th3hypn0tist__symbolic-memory.rationale: Symbolic memory system with PostgreSQL and Ollama; AGENT-001 and EXFIL-001 from legitimate memory storage and retrieval patterns

kimbo128__drain-mcp.rationale: USDC payment channels on Polygon; EXFIL-007 from crypto transaction patterns represent real financial risk

wljmmx__cross-channel-memory.rationale: Cross-channel memory sync across QQ/Feishu; AGENT-001 from agent coordination patterns are expected for the cross-platform sync use case

ok-james-01__okx-onchain-gateway.rationale: OKX blockchain transaction broadcaster; multiple RCE-001 from transaction execution patterns represent real financial execution risk

assistant-design__clawflight.rationale: Flight search with affiliate links; CRED-006 from API key patterns and PERSIST-001 from caching are expected for travel search functionality

driftsbot__experience-body-electric.rationale: Immersive experience platform; EXFIL-006 from API calls to drifts.bot plus INJECT-002 patterns from agent instruction handling push score higher than expected, but behavior is legitimate

dbalve__fastio-skills.rationale: Agent workspace platform; RCE-005 and INJECT-002 from tool routing patterns are structural to the workspace framework

khaliqgant__relaycast.rationale: Multi-agent messaging system; EXFIL-006 and CRED-006 from API key and message transmission plus INJECT-002 from relay message handling push score higher than expected, but behavior is legitimate for relay functionality

donghaozhang__qcut-toolkit.rationale: Media toolkit with many sub-skills; high EXFIL-006 count from legitimate media processing API calls across sub-tools

impkind__acc-error-memory.rationale: Error tracking system; 21 PERSIST-001 hits from heavy file system writes are expected for error log persistence across many tracked files

werdelin__audos.rationale: Startup workspace builder; EXFIL-006 from API calls to audos service and INJECT-002 from prompt patterns are expected for the platform

gdperkins__reporead.rationale: GitHub repo analyzer requiring API key; CRED-006 and PERSIST-002 are expected for GitHub API key handling and analysis caching

jordancoin__atl-mobile.rationale: iOS simulator automation tool; 50 EXFIL-006 hits from legitimate automation URL and data patterns across many test scenarios

summerloveqq__call-aida-app.rationale: Internal LLM invoke tool for aida.vip.sankuai.com; RCE-007 and EXFIL-002 from subprocess and HTTP calls to internal service

againta__fluid-memory.rationale: Ebbinghaus-based memory system; AGENT-005 hits from memory manipulation are structurally expected, RCE-007 from legitimate subprocess usage

niracler__nini-writing-inspiration.rationale: Chinese writing inspiration tool with no code or external calls

ivangdavila__play-store.rationale: Google Play Store publishing guide, purely instructional

zhengxinjipai__deep-research-gemini.rationale: Gemini deep research wrapper, marked as safe by author

atwatcher__mckinsey-style-meeting-brief-.rationale: Meeting brief generation tool, text-only productivity skill

vishalgojha__lead-storage.rationale: Lead storage skill with explicit confirmation gating

lxgicstudios__validator-gen.rationale: Zod/Yup schema generator; PKG-002 from npx usage is expected

yipng05-max__cjournal-analyzer.rationale: Chinese academic journal analyzer; high_entropy from Chinese text

siddontang__tidb-x.rationale: TiDB database skill; EXFIL-006 from legitimate API endpoint URLs

asio-o__minimax-plan-checker.rationale: MiniMax API plan checker; PKG-001 from python script usage

bytesagain__api-docs.rationale: ShowDoc API documentation tool; high_entropy from mixed Chinese/English text

tylordius__x-read.rationale: Twitter/X content reader; NET-001 and ESC-005 from web scraping patterns

michael-laffin__content-recycler.rationale: Content repurposing tool; PERSIST-001 from file write patterns for content storage

stperic__local-websearch.rationale: Self-hosted SearXNG search; EXFIL-002 from legitimate HTTP requests to user's own server

sa9saq__api-health-check.rationale: API health monitoring with curl; NET-001 from legitimate endpoint checking

anmolnagpal__guardduty-explainer.rationale: AWS GuardDuty finding explainer; INJECT-002 from security rule patterns in content

effimail__crop-image.rationale: Image cropping API wrapper; EXFIL-006 from legitimate API POST endpoints

lihai2582424632-droid__jiade.rationale: FLUX image generation via inference.sh; RCE-001 from allowed bash tool usage

badideal-2046__specvibe.rationale: Spec-driven dev framework; INJECT-002 and AGENT-003 from framework instruction patterns

ivangdavila__genomics.rationale: Genomics variant interpreter; AGENT-001 from clinical workflow instructions

xingstudy__hongkong-payment-qfpay.rationale: QFPay payment API integration guide; EXFIL-001 from legitimate payment API signatures

crazylion__aws-price-csv.rationale: AWS pricing CSV generator; PKG-001 and RCE-007 from pip install and subprocess patterns

wangwalk__managing-apple-notes.rationale: Apple Notes CLI wrapper; ESC-001 from AppleScript/osascript execution

administratorfung__news-aggregator-skill.rationale: Multi-source news aggregator; NET-001 from legitimate HTTP fetches to news APIs

darkdevelopers__bring-add.rationale: Bring! shopping list CLI; CRED-006 from auth token patterns for legitimate API

gzzzj__garmin-health-report.rationale: Garmin health report generator; CRED-006 from garth auth library, PKG-001 from pip install

alirezarezvani__ciso-advisor.rationale: Security advisory skill; INJECT-002 hits from security terminology in content, not actual injection

azep-ninja__quickintel-scan.rationale: Token security scanner; EXFIL-006/007 from legitimate API calls to Quick Intel for contract analysis
